problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
